Approve / Reject

Streamline artwork approval workflows. Share mockups with clients, collect approvals, and keep feedback organized in one place.

Approve or reject artwork directly.

Feedback tracking

Centralize client comments and revisions.

Version history

Maintain a record of artwork iterations.

This feature is currently in development and will be available in a future release.
